case_title: YONG CHEUN TUCK VS MAK'S AUTO BODY REPAIR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $170.00 FILED BY YONG CHEUN TUCK AS TO DEFENDANT MAK'S AUTO BODY REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
INVALID SERVICE ON MAK'S AUTO BODY, NO DESCRIPTION OF WHOM CLAIM WAS GIVEN TO.
